_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: we detected significantly reduced numbers of visible tumor lesions derived from the skin and paraspinal regions in Lats1/2-deficient mice with TAZ/YAP haploinsufficiency
details: TAZ/YAP inactivation significantly reduced numbers of visible tumor lesions from skin and paraspinal regions in Lats1/2-deficient mice
